title: Tirunaarayur Soundaryeswarar Temple
tagline: Tirunaarayur Soundaryeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tirunaarayur Soundaryeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Thirunaraiyur in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Tirunaarayur Soundaryeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Thirunaraiyur in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva. He is called as Soundaryeswarar. His consort is known as Tiripurasundari.

topPlaces.name: Lalpet
topPlaces.description: Lalpet is a Panchayat town in Cuddalore district, Tamil Nadu. Lalpet is situated in lush green surrounding with water bodies.

topPlaces.name: Kattumannarkoil
topPlaces.description: Kattumannarkoil is a Municipality and taluk headquarters in Cuddalore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Kattumannarkoil Town Panchayat constituted in 1892.

topPlaces.name: Kattumannarkoil block
topPlaces.description: Kattumannarkoil block is a revenue block of Cuddalore district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. This revenue block consist of 55 panchayat villages.Total area of Kattumannarkoil is 455 km2 including 406.38 km2 rural area and 48.74 km2 urban area.Kattumannarkoil has a population of 2,76,947 peoples.

topPlaces.name: Rayanallur Village
topPlaces.description: Rayanallur village is situated on the banks of the veeranam lake in North Chidambaram town, Cuddalore District in the state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Wellington Lake
topPlaces.description: Wellington Lake is a lake situated in the Keelachiruvoi, Pulivalam to Ivanur Alambadi villages (near Tittakudi) Tittakudi taluk of the Cuddalore district in Tamil Nadu, India. It is the second-largest lake in Tamil Nadu after the Veeranam Lake, which also is situated in the Cuddalore district.

topPlaces.name: Veeranam Lake
topPlaces.description: Veeranarayanapuram Lake, also known as Veeranam Lake is located 14 km (8.7 mi) SSW in Cuddalore district in the state of Tamil Nadu in South India 1 km (0.62 mi) from Kattumannarkoil. It is located 235 km (146 mi) from Chennai, India.

items.note: Lalpet is a Panchayat town in Cuddalore district, Tamil Nadu. Lalpet is situated in lush green surrounding with water bodies.
Kattumannarkoil is a Municipality and taluk headquarters in Cuddalore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Kattumannarkoil Town Panchayat constituted in 1892.

Kattumannarkoil block is a revenue block of Cuddalore district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. This revenue block consist of 55 panchayat villages.Total area of Kattumannarkoil is 455 km2 including 406.38 km2 rural area and 48.74 km2 urban area.Kattumannarkoil has a population of 2,76,947 peoples.
Rayanallur village is situated on the banks of the veeranam lake in North Chidambaram town, Cuddalore District in the state of Tamil Nadu.

Wellington Lake is a lake situated in the Keelachiruvoi, Pulivalam to Ivanur Alambadi villages (near Tittakudi) Tittakudi taluk of the Cuddalore district in Tamil Nadu, India. It is the second-largest lake in Tamil Nadu after the Veeranam Lake, which also is situated in the Cuddalore district.

Veeranarayanapuram Lake, also known as Veeranam Lake is located 14 km (8.7 mi) SSW in Cuddalore district in the state of Tamil Nadu in South India 1 km (0.62 mi) from Kattumannarkoil. It is located 235 km (146 mi) from Chennai, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tirunaarayur Soundaryeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tirunaarayur Soundaryeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tirunaarayur Soundaryeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (114 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (114 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tirunaarayur Soundaryeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tirunaarayur Soundaryeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tirunaarayur Soundaryeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tirunaarayur Soundaryeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tirunaarayur Soundaryeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Lalpet, Kattumannarkoil, Kattumannarkoil block, Rayanallur Village, Wellington Lake.
